name: Impossible Cloud
description: Impossible Cloud — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Object Storage.

seo.title: Impossible Cloud Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Impossible Cloud analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Impossible Cloud is a Object Storage / Media API tool.
pros: Scalable, cost-effective storage for files and media
cons: Egress fees can dominate costs at high traffic
review.best_for: Apps storing user uploads, images, or video
review.not_for: Apps with no file storage or media processing needs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
